title: leucanthemum vulgare var. pallidum
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare var. pallidum, also known as pale oxeye daisy, is a variety of the common dandelion, characterized by its pale yellow flowers and leaves. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum vulgare var. pallidum are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum vulgare var. pallidum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
